name: @iedora/testing-integration
description: Shared infrastructure for INTEGRATION tests (testcontainers Postgres + MinIO + savepoint-per-test). Sibling packages cover other tiers: @iedora/testing-unit (PGLite helpers, in-memory fakes), @iedora/testing-e2e (browser harness) — each tier is opt-in so a workspace only takes what it needs.
